user.title: Add Daily Schedule Sensor
user.description: Create a binary sensor which turns on according to a daily schedule.

data.utc: Use UTC rather than the local time zone (don't use if you're unsure)
data.skip_reversed: Skip ranges with sunrise or sunset when 'to' is earlier than or equal to 'from' (don't use if you're unsure)

is_off.description: Tests if a daily schedule is currently off.
is_off.name: Daily schedule is off

is_on.description: Tests if a daily schedule is currently on.
is_on.name: Daily schedule is on

turned_off.description: Triggers when a daily schedule turns off.
turned_off.name: Daily schedule turned off

turned_on.description: Triggers when a daily schedule turns on.
turned_on.name: Daily schedule turned on
